query:
SELECT bl.liverId, l.name as liverName, COUNT(DISTINCT lp.id) as productCount, SUM(lp.gmv) as totalProductGmv
FROM brand_livestreams bl
JOIN livestream_products lp ON lp.livestreamId = bl.id
LEFT JOIN livers l ON l.id = bl.liverId
WHERE bl.liverId IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY bl.liverId, l.name
ORDER BY totalProductGmv DESC
LIMIT 10;
